stem:
−3x + 21px = 84

In the given equation, p is a constant. The equation has no solution. What is the value of p?
explanation: Factoring the left side gives (−3 + 21p)x = 84. The equation has no solution only when the coefficient of x is 0 while the right side is nonzero, so −3 + 21p = 0, giving p = 3/21 = 1/7.
